field.title: COR
field.formula:
IF sum([reg]) > 0 THEN
    sum([visit]) / sum([reg])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF sum([reg_x15r]) > 0 THEN
    sum([visit_nhhm]) / sum([reg_x15r])
END

field.title: CRL
field.formula:
IF SUM([visit]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([broker]) / SUM([visit])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([visit_nhhm]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([broker_xe3z]) / SUM([visit_nhhm])
END

field.title: CRVL
field.formula:
IF SUM([broker]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([valid]) / SUM([broker])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([broker_xe3z]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([valid_wzk8]) / SUM([broker_xe3z])
END

field.title: CRQL
field.formula:
IF SUM([valid]) > 0 AND (SUM([qual]) / SUM([valid])) > 0  THEN
    SUM([qual]) / SUM([valid])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([valid_wzk8]) > 0 AND (SUM([qual_zkpo]) / SUM([valid_wzk8])) > 0  THEN
    SUM([qual_zkpo]) / SUM([valid_wzk8])
END

field.title: CRR
field.formula:
IF SUM([qual]) > 0 AND (SUM([booking]) / SUM([qual])) > 0 THEN
    SUM([booking]) / SUM([qual])
END
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([qual_zkpo]) > 0 AND (SUM([booking_1ft4]) / SUM([qual_zkpo])) > 0 THEN
    SUM([booking_1ft4]) / SUM([qual_zkpo])
END
